objects_tested.definition: CID = inf_D max_c ||D O_c - L||_F over shared decoder D.
objects_tested.novelty_test: Descriptor-matched opposite verdict contexts and CID separation check.
objects_tested.reason: CID separates invariant exact vs fail on descriptor-matched context families; captures architecture constraint absent from amount-only descriptors.

objects_tested.definition: PSI = min_i DLS(single terminal i) - DLS(joint terminals).
objects_tested.novelty_test: Same total rank/count partition families with opposite exactness.
objects_tested.reason: Distributed partition anomalies detected; positive-PSI exactness rate=0.300.

objects_tested.definition: IL = residual(observational) - residual(interventional) at matched measurement count.
objects_tested.reason: Intervention lifted recoverability in 18 matched-count families.

objects_tested.definition: TSF = min_theta I_F(theta) for target parameter under fixed measurement family.
objects_tested.novelty_test: Same-count sensitivity families with opposite recoverability labels.
objects_tested.reason: TSF cleanly separates sensitivity-blind vs sensitivity-resolving families at fixed count.

objects_tested.definition: RFS(O) = number of weak targets recoverable under O before strong-target failure.
objects_tested.novelty_test: Weak-vs-strong target split under fixed observation map.
objects_tested.reason: Reveals partial-recovery lattice structure (weak recoverable, strong impossible).

candidate_statements.name: Context-architecture incompatibility theorem (supported family)
candidate_statements.statement: There exist context families with identical rank/count descriptors where every context is exactly recoverable, yet no single decoder is exact across contexts.
candidate_statements.evidence: found 11 fail and 11 exact descriptor-matched context witnesses
candidate_statements.failure_mode: fails only if architecture constraint (shared decoder) is removed

candidate_statements.name: Distributed arrangement anti-classifier theorem (supported family)
candidate_statements.statement: In two-terminal linear partition families, total measurement count and joint rank do not determine exact recoverability; terminal arrangement can flip the verdict.

candidate_statements.name: CID separation conjecture
candidate_statements.statement: Context-Invariance Defect threshold separates invariant exact/fail classes in generated multi-context families.
candidate_statements.failure_mode: may collapse under broader nonlinear/contextual families

candidate_statements.name: Sensitivity-floor no-go
candidate_statements.statement: At fixed measurement count, zero Fisher sensitivity floor implies no finite-variance unbiased local estimator for the target parameter (Cramér-Rao no-go).
candidate_statements.failure_mode: applies to local unbiased estimation regime

candidate_statements.name: Naive amount-only claim
candidate_statements.statement: Same rank and same count imply same exact-recovery verdict.
candidate_statements.evidence: counterexamples found in causal, multi-terminal, and Willems lanes
